title: Smart Contract Template Lifecycle
description: A flowchart illustrating the creation, deployment, and execution process of a smart contract template, highlighting its reusability and efficiency.
relationships: A predefined Template is created with fixed logic and variable parameters
A User fills in the parameters to customize the contract for their specific use case
The parameterized contract is deployed as a new Instance on the blockchain
The Instance automatically Executes its terms when predefined conditions are met
